admin_enabled.description: Enable or disable admin user access.

anonymous_pull_enabled.description: Allow anonymous pull access to the registry.

data_endpoint_enabled.description: Enable data endpoint for the registry.

export_policy_enabled.description: Enable export policy for the registry.

name.description: The name of the container registry.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Enable public network access to the registry.

sku.description: The SKU of the container registry.

tags.description: Tags to associate with the registry.

zone_redundancy_enabled.description: Enable zone redundancy for high availability.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
